intent: We are launching a connected ambulance pilot next week; spin up a dedicated URLLC slice for the fleet.
Port authority needs isolated connectivity for crane automation by Friday morning.
Provision a new eMBB slice to handle the live broadcast uplink streams from the sports arena.
The mining company contract went live today — assign them a private slice on site B.
Need a low-latency slice stood up for remote robotic surgery trials at the university hospital.
A new smart metering rollout is starting in the eastern region; create a suitable MIoT slice for it.
Set up a slice for the autonomous drone delivery service operating in the logistics park.
The fashion week event slice is no longer required; go ahead and tear it down.
Decommission the disaster recovery slice that was activated during the flooding incident last month.
Trial slice NSI-0047 has expired — please release all associated resources.
The festival ended yesterday, so the temporary public broadband slice can be removed.
Shut down the logistics slice for the warehouse that closed operations this quarter.
Terminate the pilot URLLC slice — the customer decided not to proceed with the project.
The construction-site slice was a temporary contract; deactivate it and free the RBs.
Pull up all slices currently running across the metro area.
Before the morning standup I need a snapshot of all active slice instances.
Give me the full inventory of slices along with their current load status.
How many slice instances do we have running right now?
List all slices associated with enterprise customers in zone 3.
Fetch the slice catalogue for the northern cluster so I can plan tonight's maintenance.
The hospital slice is nearing its device cap ahead of the mass-casualty drill — raise the UE ceiling.
We expect 30,000 additional connected sensors during the summer festival; update the UE quota on the IoT slice accordingly.
Bump the registered device limit on the enterprise campus slice before the new employee onboarding next Monday.
The smart parking solution is expanding to a second district; the slice needs to accommodate more vehicles.
UE quota on slice NSI-0021 is too restrictive for the current deployment scale — please revise it.
We onboarded three new industrial clients on the same MIoT slice; increase the maximum device count.
The V2X slice is hitting its session limit during morning commute hours — the PDU cap needs to go up.
More concurrent video feeds are being pushed through the broadcasting slice; update the PDU session quota before the evening match.
Session drops are occurring on the logistics slice during shift changes — we need a higher PDU session ceiling.
The remote monitoring platform is scaling up; revise the allowed concurrent sessions on their dedicated slice.
Adjust the PDU session limit on the critical infrastructure slice ahead of the grid management upgrade.
Port expansion means more ship transponders connecting simultaneously — increase PDU session quota on the maritime slice.
The URLLC slice for remote machinery is starved for radio resources during the day shift — push the RB ratio higher.
Reduce RB allocation on the entertainment slice overnight when traffic is minimal and redirect capacity to the public safety slice.
RAN congestion is hitting the broadband slice on cell NR-0088 — we need a larger share of resource blocks.
The autonomous vehicle slice is underperforming in the test corridor; increase its RB percentage at the gNB.
Throughput on the premium eMBB slice is degraded during peak hours; adjust the RB allocation ratio upward.
We've renegotiated the SLA with the railway operator — their slice needs a higher RB share starting tonight.
Set a tighter cap on the number of RRC-connected users for the public Wi-Fi offload slice to protect critical services.
RRC signaling load at gNB-112 is spiking; lower the RRC connection limit on the consumer slice.
We need more simultaneous RRC connections permitted on the emergency services slice during the national drill.
The stadium slice is overwhelming the gNB with RRC setups; apply a connection ceiling before kickoff.
Update the max RRC connected users parameter for the campus slice — the university is back in session and loads are climbing.
Scale the RRC user limit on the gaming slice down during off-peak hours to free signaling capacity.
We're seeing intermittent SCTP link failures between the CU and DU on site 7 — can someone look into it?
Latency on the core network side jumped to 35 ms after the last software upgrade — what's causing it?
Multiple customers in the downtown district are reporting dropped calls since 14:00 — need an RCA.
What is the current uplink PRB utilization trend across all gNBs in region north?
Check whether the BGP session between PE-router-03 and the data center is stable.
A major enterprise client is complaining about billing discrepancies on their last invoice — please escalate to the commercial team.
